title: Entity Apply Knockback Rules
description: Defines how an entity applies knockback.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description:
Array of rules instances defining how knockback should be applied to the entity.

• iron_golem: [{"horizontal_power":1.3,"vertical_power":0.39,...
• player: [{"filter":{"test":"enum_property","subject":"o...
